title: Johanna C report published
body: "Our accident investigation report on the fatal accident during cargo operations on board Johanna C while alongside at Songkhla, Thailand on 11 May 2016 is now published.   The report, available via this link, contains details of what happened and the subsequent actions taken.    Media enquiries (telephone only)       Media enquiries during office hours 01932 440015   Media enquiries out of hours 0300 7777878      "
